skill.name: ppxc-find-customers
skill.description: Find customer leads from short-video comments, generate discovery keywords, review lead intent, and prepare outreach scripts with PPXC.
skill.summary: Discover and qualify customer leads from short-video comments and social signals using PPXC's lead-generation tools.
skill.author: yuanjian068yuan

security_audit.summary: The skill is a marketing and sales lead-generation tool that connects to the PPXC service via an MCP server. Static analysis flagged multiple patterns, but all are false positives: the 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at line 3 is a misidentified description text, the 'backtick execution' warnings are markdown formatting for tool names, and the hardcoded URL points to official PPXC setup documentation. The only real risk is dependency on the external ppxc-leads-mcp package, which is standard for MCP-based skills.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URL to external service
low_findings.description: The skill contains a hardcoded URL (https://opc1.me/download/mcp) linking to the official PPXC MCP download page. This is a documentation reference, not a data exfiltration endpoint, but users should verify the URL is still valid and points to the legitimate PPXC service.

content.user_title: Find Customer Leads from Short-Video Comments
content.value_statement: Finding qualified customer leads from social media comments is time-consuming and inconsistent. This skill automates the process by connecting to PPXC, generating discovery keywords, analyzing comment intent, and preparing outreach scripts.
actual_capabilities: Check PPXC connection status and guide account setup
List products and select the matching offer for lead searches
Generate customer-discovery keywords based on product context
Search short-video comments for buying signals and intent
Query the customer pool and rank leads by intent level
Prepare outreach scripts and next-step actions for qualified leads
limitations: Requires a PPXC account and active connection to function
Lead quality depends on the volume and quality of source comments
Outreach scripts are templates that should be reviewed before sending
Does not perform automated outreach without user approval

use_cases.title: Small Business Lead Generation
use_cases.description: A small business owner wants to find potential customers commenting on competitor short-videos. This skill helps discover buying intent and build a qualified lead list.

use_cases.title: Marketing Team Campaign Research
use_cases.description: A marketing team needs to identify trending customer pain points from social comments to inform campaign messaging and targeting.

use_cases.title: Sales Team Outreach Preparation
use_cases.description: A sales team wants to prepare personalized outreach scripts for leads discovered through short-video comment analysis, improving response rates.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Lead Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Find customer leads for my product.
prompt_templates.scenario: First-time use, starting with a general lead search

prompt_templates.title: Product-Specific Discovery
prompt_templates.prompt: List my products and help me find leads for [product name]. Generate keywords and search for buying signals in recent comments.
prompt_templates.scenario: Targeted search for a specific product or offer

prompt_templates.title: Intent Analysis and Ranking
prompt_templates.prompt: Query my customer pool and rank leads by buying intent. Show me the top 10 with the strongest signals.
prompt_templates.scenario: Reviewing existing leads and prioritizing outreach

prompt_templates.title: Outreach Script Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: For the top 5 leads from my pool, prepare personalized outreach scripts that reference their comment context and offer value.
prompt_templates.scenario: Preparing customized outreach for qualified leads

output_examples.input: Find customer leads for my fitness coaching program.
output_examples.output: Generated 12 discovery keywords including 'home workout help', 'weight loss tips', 'beginner fitness routine'. Searched 847 recent comments and identified 23 leads with buying intent. Top lead: comment expressing frustration with current routine and asking for personalized guidance.

output_examples.input: Rank my customer pool by intent.
output_examples.output: Reviewed 45 leads in your pool. Top 5 by intent score: (1) Lead asking about pricing, (2) Lead comparing alternatives, (3) Lead requesting demo, (4) Lead asking about availability, (5) Lead mentioning timeline. Recommended priority: contact top 3 within 24 hours.

output_examples.input: Prepare outreach for my top 3 leads.
output_examples.output: Script 1: Reference their comment about struggling with consistency. Lead with empathy, share a quick tip, offer a free consultation. Script 2: Address their comparison concerns by highlighting unique program features. Script 3: Confirm their timeline and propose a specific start date.

best_practices: Always start with check_status_and_login to confirm PPXC connection is ready before searching
Use list_products before searching to ensure results match the correct product or offer
Review generated keywords and refine them based on your specific target audience before launching searches
anti_patterns: Do not skip the connection check and jump directly to searching, as this may return errors or stale data
Do not use generic keywords without reviewing them first, as this dilutes lead quality
Do not send outreach scripts without personalization and review, as generic messages reduce response rates

faq.question: What is PPXC and do I need an account?
faq.answer: PPXC is the lead-generation service this skill connects to. You need an active PPXC account to use this skill. The skill will guide you through setup if your account is not connected.

faq.question: How does the skill find leads?
faq.answer: The skill generates discovery keywords based on your product, then searches short-video comments for buying signals and intent. It ranks leads by intent level and saves qualified leads to your customer pool.

faq.question: Can I customize the search keywords?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill generates initial keywords using suggest_search_keywords, but you can refine them before launching searches to better match your target audience.

faq.question: Does the skill send outreach automatically?
faq.answer: No. The skill prepares outreach scripts and next-step actions for your review. You must approve and send messages manually to maintain quality control.

faq.question: What if my PPXC connection fails?
faq.answer: The skill will detect connection issues and prompt you to reconnect. You can also use export_diagnostics to generate a support package if you need troubleshooting help.

faq.question: Is my customer data secure?
faq.answer: Lead data is stored in your PPXC customer pool and accessed through authenticated MCP connections. The skill does not export data to external locations outside of your PPXC account.
